scope_note: QA Sixteen Identities Cert family [148]: certifies the 16 named quantities (A-L,X,W,Y,Z) of a prime Pythagorean direction and 9 algebraic relations: G+C=A, G-C=B, G=(A+B)/2, F^2+C^2=G^2, H^2+I^2=2G^2, L=CF/12 integer, C=4-par, G=5-par, W=X+K. Source: Ben Iverson Pyth-1 Ch V (Sixteen Identities).
